title: Strength – Eggetarian
plateMethod: Eat enough to fuel training: protein at each meal from eggs, legumes, dairy, tofu, and paneer; complex carbs around training (rice, oats, potatoes); healthy fats.
hydration: Aim for 2.5–3 L of water per day. Drink before, during, and after training.
sampleMeals: Breakfast: Eggs with toast and fruit; or oatmeal with milk, nuts, and banana.
Lunch: Dal or chickpea curry with rice or potato and vegetables.
Dinner: Tofu or paneer with rice, potatoes, and vegetables; or eggs with rice and salad.
Pre/workout: Carbs + light protein 1–2 hours before (e.g. banana and yogurt).
Post-workout: Protein and carbs within 1–2 hours (e.g. eggs and rice, or dal and rice).
disclaimer: General guidance only; consult a healthcare or nutrition professional for personalized advice.
